brand.name: Online Coaching 4u
brand.tagline: Find the right coaching, school or hostel — verified, compared, reviewed.

listings.name: Navjeevan NEET Academy
listings.address: Piprali Rd, Jat Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Navjeevan NEET Academy is a NEET-focused coaching institute on Piprali Road, Sikar, launched by the Navjeevan Science Group — an education group that has run schools and JEE/defence coaching in Sikar for over 17 years, led by director Shankar Lal Bagaria. The academy operates from SB Tower on Piprali Road, in the heart of Sikar's coaching cluster. On our platform it holds a 5.0 rating from 59 student reviews — the largest review base of any coaching institute in Sikar — and its details are verified with the institute. Being NEET-only, the entire timetable, test series and faculty bench are built around the medical entrance rather than split across exams.
highlights: Backed by Navjeevan Science Group, active in Sikar education for 17+ years
NEET-only focus — no split attention across exams
Largest student review base of any Sikar institute on our platform (59 reviews)

listings.name: Matrix IIT-JEE / NEET Coaching
listings.address: Piprali Rd, opposite Ganpati Plaza, Jat Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Matrix Academy, established in 2014, is one of Sikar's strongest JEE institutes, founded by a team of IIT Kharagpur alumni including Anil Gora — 'AG Sir' to students. Its campus sits on Piprali Road opposite Ganpati Plaza. The institute reports more than 6,000 students qualifying JEE Advanced since 2015 and runs a separate NEET division alongside its flagship JEE programs, with foundation batches for younger classes. Students rate it 4.7 from 20 reviews on our platform. Matrix is typically shortlisted by aspirants who want IIT-alumni-led teaching in Sikar without moving to Kota.
highlights: Founded 2014 by IIT Kharagpur alumni, led by Anil Gora (AG Sir)
Institute reports 6,000+ JEE Advanced qualifiers since 2015
Separate NEET division and pre-foundation programs alongside JEE

listings.name: Gurukripa Career Institute (GCI)
listings.address: Jyoti Nagar, Piprali Road, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
highlights: Multiple campuses across Sikar, Jaipur and Alwar
GSAT scholarship test with up to 100% fee waiver
Foundation courses for classes 6-10 alongside NEET and JEE
Hostel and mess support for outstation students
listings.about: Gurukripa Career Institute (GCI) is Sikar's most established large-scale coaching institute, teaching NEET, IIT-JEE and foundation courses (classes 6–10) since 2007. Its head office is at Jyoti Nagar on Piprali Road, with additional campuses in Jaipur and Alwar. Gurukripa runs its own scholarship test, GSAT, through which students can earn fee waivers of up to 100%, and provides hostel and mess support for the large outstation population it draws from across North India. The listing is verified with the institute and rates 5.0 from 23 student reviews on our platform. For many families comparing Sikar options, GCI is the benchmark the newer institutes measure themselves against.

listings.name: Path Career Institute
listings.address: JK Heights, Piprali Rd, New Janta Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Path Career Institute is Sikar's most talked-about new NEET institute, launched in 2025 at JK Heights on Piprali Road by a group of senior faculty who previously taught at Gurukripa — including biology teachers Bhawani Sir, with over two decades of teaching experience, and DK Sir, with more than twelve years. That ex-GCI lineage is the institute's core pitch: experienced topper-producing faculty in a new, smaller setup where batch access to teachers is easier. Early student response has been strong — 5.0 from 19 reviews on our platform — though as a first-year institute it has no independent results history yet, which aspirants should weigh honestly.
highlights: Founded by senior ex-Gurukripa faculty, including 21+ year biology teacher Bhawani Sir
NEET-only program in a deliberately smaller, high-access setup
New in 2025 — strong early reviews but no independent results history yet

listings.name: PCP (Prince Career Pioneer)
listings.address: Palwas Road, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
highlights: Produced NEET UG 2024 AIR 1 — Devesh Joshi's perfect 720/720
Part of the Prince Eduhub group, in Sikar education since 1998
Dedicated JEE/NEET campus on Palwas Road since 2009
listings.about: PCP (Prince Career Pioneer) is the JEE/NEET coaching arm of the Prince Eduhub education group, whose roots in Sikar schooling go back to 1998; the PCP coaching campus on Palwas Road has operated since 2009 under director Jogender Sunda. PCP delivered Sikar's biggest result to date: in NEET UG 2024, its student Devesh Joshi scored a perfect 720/720 to take All India Rank 1 — a landmark widely credited with putting Sikar on the national coaching map. Students rate it 4.2 from 10 reviews on our platform. PCP suits aspirants who want a results-proven system attached to one of Sikar's oldest education groups.

listings.name: CLC Institute
listings.address: Pandit Harinath Chaturvedi Marg, Piprali Rd, Railway Station Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: CLC (Career Line Coaching) is the oldest coaching institute in Sikar, founded in 1996 by Er. Shrawan Choudhary — locals often call it the mother of the city's coaching ecosystem, since several of Sikar's institutes trace their faculty lineage to it. From its Piprali Road head office, CLC teaches NEET, JEE (Main & Advanced), Olympiads, NDA and pre-foundation classes, and the institute reports 36 state-first ranks in NEET over its history. It has since expanded with branches in Jaipur, Jodhpur and Alwar. Students rate it 4.5 from 11 reviews on our platform. CLC appeals to families who value three decades of institutional continuity over newer, flashier setups.
highlights: Sikar's oldest coaching institute — teaching since 1996
Founded by Er. Shrawan Choudhary; branches now in Jaipur, Jodhpur and Alwar
Covers NEET, JEE, Olympiads, NDA and pre-foundation under one roof

listings.name: Sri Chaitanya Academy
listings.address: Piprali Rd, Jat Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Sri Chaitanya Academy's Sikar centre, opened in 2024 in Jat Colony off Piprali Road, brings one of India's largest education groups into the city's coaching market. The Sri Chaitanya group, which originated in Andhra Pradesh and runs one of the country's biggest school-plus-coaching networks, is nationally known for its structured JEE and NEET programs and integrated foundation model. The Sikar campus teaches JEE and NEET batches. As a recent entrant it has only a handful of local reviews so far, so aspirants should judge it on a campus visit and demo class rather than ratings alone.

listings.name: ALLEN Career Institute
listings.address: Near Piprali Circle, Jhunjhunu Bypass, Piprali Rd, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: ALLEN Career Institute's Sikar campus, near Piprali Circle on the Jhunjhunu Bypass, is the local outpost of India's best-known medical and engineering coaching brand, founded in Kota in 1988. The Sikar centre runs classroom programs for JEE and NEET on the same academic system as ALLEN's Kota headquarters — same study material, test series and batch structure. For Sikar students, it offers the ALLEN system without relocation to Kota. Its local review base on our platform is still small, so treat the national brand's reputation and a campus visit as your main evidence.

listings.name: Kalam IAS Academy
listings.address: Nawalgarh Rd, Vision Janta Colony, Jat Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Kalam IAS Academy, operating since 2017 from Jat Colony on Nawalgarh Road, prepares Sikar students for civil services and state government exams — IAS, RAS and teaching recruitment tests. It serves aspirants who want structured UPSC/RPSC preparation without moving to Jaipur or Delhi, the usual destinations for civil-services coaching. The institute has not yet accumulated student reviews on our platform; if you have studied here, your review would genuinely help others weigh the option.

listings.name: Inspector SSC Academy
listings.address: Charan Singh Gate, Nawalgarh Rd, Charan Singh Nagar, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Inspector SSC Academy, running since 2014 near Charan Singh Gate on Nawalgarh Road, is a government-exam specialist — its batches target SSC, LDC, Police, RAS and Railway recruitment rather than the JEE/NEET mainstream that dominates Sikar. That specialisation matters: government-exam coaching lives on speed drills, current affairs and exam-pattern updates, which generalist academies often under-serve. The institute has no student reviews on our platform yet, so visit, sit in a session, and ask about the test-series schedule before enrolling.

listings.name: Aayaam Career Academy
listings.address: Piprali Rd, New Janta Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Aayaam Career Academy is a young NEET-focused institute on Piprali Road in New Janta Colony, teaching since 2024. It is one of several compact NEET-only academies that have opened in Sikar as the city's medical-coaching reputation has grown, pitching smaller batches and closer faculty access than the large campuses. Early feedback is positive — 5.0 from its first 3 reviews on our platform — but with a review base this small, a personal visit and demo class should carry more weight than the number.

listings.name: Kautilya IIT-JEE Academy
listings.address: Piprali Rd, Jat Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Kautilya IIT-JEE Academy, established in 2017 on Piprali Road, is a JEE-specialist institute — one of the few in Sikar focused on engineering entrance rather than splitting between JEE and NEET. The institute reports more than 800 students qualifying JEE Advanced since 2018. Its listing is verified with the institute, and students rate it 3.8 from 5 reviews on our platform — a mixed early signal worth probing in person: sit in a class, ask current students about faculty stability, and compare against Matrix and Gurukripa's JEE batches before deciding.
highlights: JEE-specialist focus — one of few Sikar institutes not splitting with NEET
Institute reports 800+ JEE Advanced qualifiers since 2018
Verified listing; mixed early ratings worth checking in person

listings.name: Vibrant SSC Academy
listings.address: Choudhary Complex, Nawalgarh Rd, Ram Nagar, Jat Colony, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Vibrant SSC Academy has prepared Sikar students for government recruitment exams since 2013 from Choudhary Complex on Nawalgarh Road, Jat Colony. Its programs cover SSC, LDC, Railway, Banking and RAS — the full spread of central and Rajasthan state government exams. A decade of operation makes it one of the more established govt-exam specialists in the city, though it has not yet gathered student reviews on our platform. Ask the academy for its recent selection list and verify a couple of names independently before enrolling — the standard check for this category.

listings.name: PW Vidyapeeth
listings.address: Ward no 39, Samarthpura School, Piprali Road, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: PW Vidyapeeth Sikar is the offline centre of Physics Wallah — the edtech company that grew from Alakh Pandey's YouTube teaching into one of India's largest education platforms — located on Piprali Road. Vidyapeeth centres pair PW's famously low-fee model with physical classrooms: local faculty handle doubt-solving and discipline while the core lectures and test series ride on PW's national academic system for JEE and NEET. It suits students who want PW's affordability with the structure of a daily classroom, though its Sikar-specific review base on our platform is still tiny.

listings.name: Alpha NDA Academy
listings.address: Piprali Rd, Ghorana Ki Dhani, Sikar, Rajasthan 332001
listings.about: Alpha NDA Academy, teaching since 2016 on Piprali Road, is Sikar's defence-exam specialist, preparing students for NDA and CDS alongside civil-services foundations. Defence preparation differs meaningfully from JEE/NEET coaching — SSB interview readiness, physical standards and general-awareness weight — which is why a dedicated academy can out-serve a generalist one for these exams. Students rate it 4.0 from 2 early reviews on our platform; ask specifically about written-exam results and SSB-stage support when you visit.

listings.name: IMS Learning Resources
listings.address: Head office in Mumbai; 90+ centres across 50+ cities in India
listings.about: IMS Learning Resources, founded in Mumbai in 1977, is among India's oldest test-prep institutes and runs roughly 90+ centres across 50+ cities alongside full online CAT programs. Its SimCAT mock series is one of India's most widely taken CAT test series — which matters because percentile benchmarks are only as good as the test-taker pool behind them. The SimCAT 2026 packages go up to 40 full-length mocks with detailed video solutions, 30 sectional tests, and AI-powered performance insights that benchmark you against a national percentile and generate personalised improvement suggestions. Beyond CAT, IMS covers MH-CET, GMAT, GRE, CLAT and IPMAT, and pairs test prep with B-school selection mentoring — a legacy strength from five decades in admissions counselling.
highlights: Founded 1977 — among India's first CAT test-prep institutes
SimCAT 2026: up to 40 full mocks with AI insights and national percentile benchmarking
One of India's largest mock test-taker pools, making percentiles meaningful
90+ centres in 50+ cities plus complete online programs

listings.name: Career Launcher
listings.address: Headquartered in New Delhi; 200+ learning centres across India, Dubai and Abu Dhabi
listings.about: Career Launcher, founded in 1995 by IIM Bangalore alumnus Satya Narayanan R, is one of India's largest test-prep companies, with 200+ learning centres across India plus international centres in Dubai and Abu Dhabi. Its CAT 2026 test series packages 30+1 CAT-specific mocks — every mock comes with detailed video solutions and AI-powered performance analysis covering accuracy, topic-wise strengths and improvement areas — plus sectional and topic tests. Classroom, hybrid and online formats run on the same mentor-led model the company is known for, and coverage spans CLAT, IPMAT, CUET, GRE and GMAT alongside CAT. Career Launcher suits aspirants who want a large, established organisation with physical centres to walk into and a mentor attached to their preparation.
highlights: Founded 1995 by IIM Bangalore alumnus Satya Narayanan R
CAT 2026 series: 30+1 mocks, each with video solutions and AI performance analysis
200+ centres across India plus Dubai and Abu Dhabi
Mentor-led model across classroom, hybrid and online formats

listings.name: T.I.M.E. (Triumphant Institute of Management Education)
listings.locality: Connaught Place, Hudson Lane, Pitampura, Dwarka, Satya Niketan
listings.address: Multiple centres across Delhi, including Connaught Place, Hudson Lane, Pitampura, Dwarka and Satya Niketan
listings.about: T.I.M.E. (Triumphant Institute of Management Education), founded in 1992, is a pan-India test-prep brand running multiple CAT coaching centres across Delhi — including Connaught Place, Hudson Lane, Pitampura, Dwarka and Satya Niketan — alongside online and live-class programs. Faculty vary by centre, with senior mentors covering VARC, DILR and Quant, and both weekday and weekend batches are offered; seat availability should be checked directly with the specific centre. A full CAT classroom or online course is generally priced in the range of about ₹50,000–₹75,000 depending on duration, centre and inclusions. Students generally report a positive classroom experience, strong faculty and a well-established test series, though some note that the experience can vary by branch and individual faculty.
highlights: Long-standing brand with a wide branch network across Delhi
Established CAT test series alongside section-wise specialised modules
Comprehensive GD/PI support included
Both weekday and weekend batch options

listings.name: Arun Sharma's Mindworkzz
listings.address: Classroom centre in the Connaught Place area of Delhi, plus online/live courses for students across India
listings.about: Arun Sharma's Mindworkzz is a niche CAT coaching brand built around Arun Sharma, the well-known CAT Quant author, who leads a core team of senior faculty covering Quant, LRDI and VARC — with some sessions taught by Arun Sharma himself. It runs classroom batches from its Delhi centre alongside online/live courses reaching students nationwide, with limited-seat weekday and weekend options. Course fees for a complete CAT program are commonly in the range of about ₹60,000–₹80,000 depending on the mode and inclusions, with smaller specialised batches and doubt sessions also offered. Students frequently praise the Quant training and the quality of practice questions, though some prefer to supplement their verbal preparation with other sources or coaches.
highlights: High focus on Quant, taught with author-curated material
Challenging, rigorously curated problem sets
Targeted coaching aimed at high-percentile aspirants
Limited-seat batches led by a senior, author-led faculty team

listings.name: TathaGat (TG)
listings.address: Classroom centre on Barakhamba Road, Delhi, plus online classes and test-series for students outside Delhi
listings.about: TathaGat (TG), founded in 2007, is a boutique CAT coaching institute known for a student-first approach built around rigorous concept-building, regular homework and frequent interaction between students and faculty. Classroom coaching runs from its Delhi centre on Barakhamba Road, in carefully sized batches, alongside online classes and test-series for students outside Delhi. Course fees are usually in the range of about ₹55,000–₹75,000 depending on the specific program, with batches generally structured as weekday or weekend intensive programs. Students often praise the personal attention, doubt-solving and serious peer group, though limited seats mean batches fill up early — which also keeps class sizes controlled.
highlights: Small batch sizes with personalised attention
Rigorous, frequent question practice
Tightly monitored, closely mentored learning environment
Founder-led team known for close student interaction

listings.name: MBAGuru
listings.locality: Connaught Place, Kailash Colony, Rajouri Garden
listings.address: Multiple centres in Delhi including Connaught Place, Kailash Colony and Rajouri Garden, alongside online adaptive courses
listings.about: MBAGuru is a Delhi-headquartered CAT coaching institute known for its "adaptive" preparation model, which adjusts difficulty and focus based on individual student performance, backed by structured classroom teaching. It runs classroom programs from centres across Delhi — including Connaught Place, Kailash Colony and Rajouri Garden — alongside online adaptive courses and multiple batch options, with mentors described as 99+ percentilers heading different sections. CAT programs generally fall in a range of about ₹60,000–₹75,000, with classroom batches offered in both weekday and weekend modes and separate online batches available. Students often highlight the personalised attention and adaptive approach as positives, while some compare the fees with bigger national brands even as they appreciate the Delhi-centric focus.
highlights: Adaptive prep methodology tailored to individual performance
Relatively smaller batches than large national brands
Detailed performance analytics and regular student feedback
Both classroom (Delhi) and online batch options

listings.name: Alchemist (Alchemist Learning)
listings.address: Centres in Pitampura and Connaught Place, Delhi, with some blended/online support
listings.about: Alchemist (Alchemist Learning) is a Delhi-focused CAT coaching institute positioned around personalised coaching delivered through smaller, mentor-driven batches, with a senior in-house faculty team specialising across Quant, LRDI and VARC. It runs classroom programs from centres in Pitampura and Connaught Place, with some blended and online support, and limited-size batches running through the year. The fee range is usually reported at around ₹60,000–₹90,000 depending on the course depth and duration, with different weekday and weekend batch options offered. Students generally appreciate the personalised atmosphere and direct faculty access, though some consider it a slightly premium-priced option for its boutique positioning.
highlights: Small batch sizes with individual doubt-solving
Mentor-driven teaching model
Emphasis on conceptual clarity over rote practice
Centres in both Pitampura and Connaught Place

listings.name: AnkGanit
listings.address: Classroom centre associated with Connaught Place, Delhi, plus online/live Quant-focused courses
listings.about: AnkGanit is a boutique CAT coaching institute with a clear emphasis on Quantitative Aptitude — reflected in its name — known for focused practice and high-level problem-solving, delivered by a math-focused faculty team with strong Quant backgrounds and structured material supporting the other sections. Classroom coaching runs from its Delhi centre, often associated with Connaught Place, alongside online/live Quant-focused offerings, with limited-size batches and start dates scheduled across the year. The reported fee for full CAT preparation is roughly around ₹40,000, though this may vary with inclusions and timing, and full batch details are shared directly by the centre. Students frequently credit AnkGanit with strengthening their Quant, and many combine it with separate verbal coaching for a more balanced overall CAT preparation strategy.
highlights: Strong specialisation in Quantitative Aptitude
Intensive, high-level problem practice
Personalised doubt-clearing
Focus on building both speed and accuracy

listings.name: Kitabee CAT Preparation
listings.address: Classroom centre in Jhandewalan Extension and nearby areas of Delhi, with online support and test-series
listings.about: Kitabee CAT Preparation is a Delhi-based CAT coaching centre offering full-length classroom programs, test-series and doubt-solving sessions at a relatively accessible price point, taught by classroom faculty experienced in CAT coaching with section-wise mentors for Quant, LRDI and VARC. It runs from a centre in Jhandewalan Extension and nearby areas, with relatively compact weekday and weekend batches, alongside online support and test-series. Course fees are commonly reported at around ₹55,000 for the full program, subject to change, with batch options usually including both weekday and weekend slots. Reviews are generally mixed to positive, with students liking the classroom environment and the affordability compared to some larger brands, aimed at both working professionals and full-time students alike.
highlights: Focus on direct classroom interaction with approachable faculty
Structured test practice and doubt-solving sessions
Relatively accessible pricing versus larger national brands
Batches suited to both working professionals and full-time students

listings.name: Hitbullseye
listings.address: E-305, Phase 8A, Industrial Area, Mohali; centres in Chandigarh, Ludhiana, Patiala, Yamunanagar and Ambala
listings.about: Hitbullseye (Bulls Eye), founded in 1996 by XLRI and IIM alumni and headquartered in Mohali near Chandigarh, runs six physical centres across five North Indian cities and one of the most generous free online portals in Indian test prep — lakhs of aspirants use its free mocks and practice material without ever buying a course. Its paid CAT 2026 test series bundles more than 105 practice tests spanning CAT plus the other MBA entrances (XAT, SNAP, NMAT, IBSAT), now with AI-based performance analytics layered on results. Courses also cover CLAT, IPMAT, banking exams, GRE and GMAT. Hitbullseye works best as either a value-focused main course in North India or a high-volume practice supplement to any other platform.
highlights: Founded 1996 by XLRI and IIM alumni; six centres across North India
105+ practice tests covering CAT, XAT, SNAP, NMAT and IBSAT in one series
AI-based performance analytics on its CAT 2026 test series
One of the largest free mock and practice portals in Indian test prep

listings.name: CATKing Educare
listings.address: Mumbai-based; classroom centres in Mumbai plus live online programs pan-India
listings.about: CATKing Educare is a Mumbai-based MBA coaching institute founded by Sumit Singh Gandhi — an SPJIMR Mumbai PGDM graduate with a B.Tech from NIT Karnataka and Harvard executive education — who still personally teaches the live VARC classes. CATKing runs no franchisees: everything is delivered by the core team, with faculty drawn from IIM, SP Jain, NMIMS and JBIMS alumni. Its CAT 2026 lineup spans Intensive and Turbo courses through to dedicated repeater programs pitched at specific percentile bands, with live lectures, updated e-books and full-length mocks, and course validity extending into 2027 so a two-attempt plan is covered by one purchase. Its strongest differentiator remains Maharashtra depth: MH-CET coverage and non-IIM B-school strategy (SPJIMR, NMIMS, JBIMS) that national platforms treat as an afterthought.
highlights: Founder Sumit Singh Gandhi (SPJIMR) still teaches every live VARC class
No-franchisee model — all programs run directly by the core team
CAT 2026 courses include repeater programs pitched at specific percentile bands
Strongest MH-CET and Maharashtra B-school coverage in the category

listings.name: Rodha
listings.address: Online — YouTube-first CAT preparation, available pan-India
listings.about: Rodha is a YouTube-first CAT preparation platform founded by Ravi Prakash, a 99.86 percentile CAT scorer who put the complete CAT syllabus — more than 1,400 videos across Quant, VARC and LRDI — on YouTube for free, growing the channel past 400,000 subscribers. For CAT 2026, Rodha's paid comprehensive batches (taught in Hinglish) add live classes with a fixed faculty per subject, a structured pacing plan that finishes the syllabus early to protect revision time, and the flexibility to switch batches up to three times a year. Its test series on mocks.rodha.co.in is deliberately built 10–15% harder than the real exam and mirrors the actual TCS iON test interface; free samples include full-length mocks, sectional tests and topic-wise mocks, all with video solutions. Coverage extends to XAT, SNAP, NMAT and other OMETs. Rodha remains the lowest-risk starting point in the category: the entire course is watchable free before any payment.
highlights: 1,400+ free full-syllabus videos on YouTube (400K+ subscribers)
CAT 2026 mocks built 10–15% harder than the real exam, on the actual TCS iON-style interface
Batch switching up to 3 times a year, with a fixed faculty per subject
Free full-length and sectional mocks with video solutions before you pay anything

listings.name: Cracku
listings.address: Online — app and web platform, available pan-India
listings.about: Cracku is an online CAT prep platform founded in 2014 by IIT-IIM alumni and led by Maruti Konduri (IIT Bombay, IIM Ahmedabad) — a five-time CAT 100-percentiler (2019, 2021–2024). Its system is built around free Daily Targets: short VARC, DILR and Quant tests released every day with video solutions recorded by Konduri himself, with streak rewards for consistency. The paid CAT 2026 course adds 25,000+ practice questions arranged as adaptive topic tests that get harder as you answer correctly, live classes, and the DashCAT mock series — 20 national-level full mocks calibrated to real CAT difficulty, 5 gentler 'Headstart' mocks for early prep, and 45 sectional tests, with faculty attempting DashCATs live to demonstrate strategy. Cracku suits self-paced aspirants who want a daily plan and data-heavy practice over classroom timetables.
highlights: Led by five-time CAT 100-percentiler Maruti Konduri (IIT-B + IIM-A)
Free Daily Targets every day with video solutions by the founder
DashCAT series: 20 national mocks + 5 Headstart mocks + 45 sectionals
25,000+ practice questions with adaptive difficulty

listings.name: iQuanta
listings.address: Online — live classes and 24/7 doubt community, available pan-India
listings.about: iQuanta is an online CAT coaching platform founded in 2019 by Indrajeet Singh — the 'Wizard of Quant', who built his reputation solving aspirants' doubts in minutes inside India's largest CAT Facebook community, now over 4 lakh members strong. That community remains its signature: doubt resolution runs 24/7 alongside live concept and application classes with daily 15–30 minute practice quizzes. The CAT 2026 program includes 750+ tests with detailed solutions and a mock series of 20 proctored plus 15 unproctored full-length CATs calibrated to the real exam's difficulty and topic mix. After each mock, an AI analytics engine breaks down accuracy and time per question, estimates your percentile, and even suggests which B-schools your current level is likely to convert. iQuanta has also expanded into IPMAT and CLAT preparation.
highlights: 24/7 doubt resolution backed by a 4-lakh+ member community
35 full-length CAT mocks (20 proctored + 15 unproctored) with AI analytics
AI insights estimate percentile and likely B-school conversions after each mock
750+ tests with daily 15–30 minute practice quizzes

listings.name: MBA Wallah (Physics Wallah)
listings.address: Online — via the PW app and pw.live, available pan-India
listings.about: MBA Wallah is the MBA entrance vertical of Physics Wallah (PW), the edtech company famous for aggressive affordability. Its CAT 2026 lineup is a ladder of batches — from a low-cost Starter Kit through Pioneer, Pro and Elite to the mentorship-heavy Power batch and the Core batch that adds foundation-building for students starting from scratch. Depending on batch, features include two-way interactive live classes, unlimited recorded playback, daily practice problems with video solutions recorded by the teaching faculty, 15,000+ practice questions, hard-copy books, and in the Power batch, 1:1 mentorship. Weekend-only options serve working professionals. MBA Wallah is the natural pick for budget-conscious aspirants who want a full live-class ecosystem at a fraction of legacy-institute pricing.
highlights: MBA vertical of Physics Wallah — the low-fee, high-volume edtech model applied to CAT
Batch ladder from budget Starter Kit to 1:1-mentorship Power batch
15,000+ practice questions with faculty-recorded video solutions
Weekend-only batch options for working professionals

listings.name: Unacademy CAT
listings.address: Online — via the Unacademy app and unacademy.com, available pan-India
listings.about: Unacademy CAT is the MBA entrance category on Unacademy, one of India's largest online learning platforms. Rather than one faculty team, it aggregates many independent top educators — including CAT 100-percentilers — teaching live classes daily across Quant, VARC and LRDI, with recorded courses, structured CAT 2026 batches (including Early Start batches for long-runway aspirants), and notes, slides and handouts bundled into the subscription. Access works on two tiers: the Plus subscription covers all live and recorded content, while Iconic adds a personal coach and one-on-one doubt-solving. A meaningful amount of content is free to watch before subscribing. Unacademy's real strength is choice — aspirants can sample several teaching styles and follow the educators that click, all inside one subscription.
highlights: Aggregates many independent top educators, including CAT 100-percentilers
Plus and Iconic tiers — Iconic adds a personal coach and 1:1 doubt-solving
CAT 2026 Early Start batches for aspirants beginning preparation early
Switch freely between educators inside one subscription

listings.name: MBA Pathshala
listings.address: Online — live and recorded programs, available pan-India
listings.about: MBA Pathshala is a compact online CAT coaching platform founded by Udit Saini, a Quantitative Aptitude and LRDI educator with over eight years of teaching experience, with co-founder Suman Shekhawat — a VARC mentor previously ranked among the top CAT educators on Unacademy. The platform runs live and recorded CAT 2026 batches with mock tests and strategy sessions, covering MH-CET and other MBA entrances alongside CAT. Its pitch is deliberate smallness: a two-person core faculty students deal with directly, rather than a rotating bench — combined with pricing positioned well below the legacy institutes. Best suited to aspirants who value direct mentor access and dislike the anonymity of large-platform batches.
highlights: Founded by Quant/LRDI educator Udit Saini (8+ years teaching)
Co-founder Suman Shekhawat was a top-ranked CAT VARC educator on Unacademy
Small two-person core faculty with direct student access
Positioned on affordability against legacy institute pricing

coaching-sikar.intro: Sikar, in Rajasthan's Shekhawati region, has grown into one of India's fastest-rising coaching destinations — a serious alternative to Kota for NEET and JEE preparation at meaningfully lower fees and living costs. The city's institutes cluster along Piprali Road and Nawalgarh Road, surrounded by hostels, libraries and mess facilities built for its large outstation student population. Sikar's breakout moment came in 2024, when a student of the city's PCP institute scored a perfect 720/720 in NEET UG to take All India Rank 1. Beyond JEE and NEET, the city also hosts specialist academies for SSC, defence (NDA/CDS) and civil-services preparation. Every listing below shows its verification status and unedited student ratings.

faqs.q: Which is the best NEET coaching in Sikar?
faqs.a: By student ratings on our platform, Navjeevan NEET Academy (5.0 from 59 reviews) and Gurukripa Career Institute (5.0 from 23 reviews, running since 2007) lead, with Path Career Institute (5.0 from 19 reviews, founded 2025 by senior ex-Gurukripa faculty) the strongest new entrant. PCP, whose student scored NEET 2024's perfect 720/720 AIR 1, is the city's most results-proven name. Visit your top two before deciding — ratings are a screen, not a verdict.

faqs.q: Which is the best JEE coaching in Sikar?
faqs.a: Matrix Academy (founded 2014 by IIT Kharagpur alumni, 4.7 rating) and Gurukripa (since 2007) have the city's strongest JEE track records; Kautilya IIT-JEE Academy is the notable JEE-specialist. CLC, teaching since 1996, and national brands ALLEN and PW Vidyapeeth also run JEE batches in Sikar.

faqs.q: How much do hostels near Sikar coaching institutes cost?
faqs.a: Hostels cluster around Piprali Road within walking distance of the major institutes. Listed room plans typically run about ₹8,000–15,000 per month including mess, with several girls-only options. See our Sikar hostel listings for verified details.

faqs.q: Is Sikar better than Kota for NEET preparation?
faqs.a: It depends on the student. Kota offers unmatched scale and competition density; Sikar offers lower costs, smaller batches and closer faculty access, with results that now compete at the top (NEET 2024's AIR 1 came from Sikar). Self-driven students often prefer Kota's ecosystem; students who benefit from supervision and a calmer environment often do better in Sikar.

coaching-online.intro: Online CAT coaching has split into two clear camps: digital-first platforms (Rodha, Cracku, iQuanta, MBA Wallah, Unacademy, MBA Pathshala) built around video, apps and communities, and the online programs of legacy classroom institutes (IMS, Career Launcher, Hitbullseye, CATKing) that bring decades of test-series data online. The comparison below covers all ten on verifiable facts — founders, formats, mock-series depth and 2026 course features. Any standout recommendation on this page is a genuine, unpaid one; every claim below an institute's name comes from the institute itself or independent sources, and is attributed accordingly.

faqs.q: Which is the best online CAT coaching in India for 2026?
faqs.a: Rodha stands out as the only platform with its complete CAT syllabus (1,400+ videos) free on YouTube, so you can verify the teaching quality before paying anything; its paid batches and harder-than-CAT mock series stay cheaper than legacy institutes. Strong alternatives by need: Cracku for app-based daily-target prep by a five-time 100-percentiler, iQuanta for 24/7 doubt support, and IMS for India's most widely taken mock series (SimCAT).

faqs.q: Which online CAT coaching is free or cheapest?
faqs.a: Rodha offers the most complete free preparation — its entire video syllabus is on YouTube, plus free full-length and sectional mocks with video solutions. Cracku's Daily Targets are free every day with video solutions. Hitbullseye runs one of the largest free practice portals. Among paid full courses, MBA Wallah (Physics Wallah) and Rodha are typically the most affordable.

faqs.q: Which CAT mock test series should I take for CAT 2026?
faqs.a: IMS SimCAT has India's largest test-taker pool, which makes its percentiles the most meaningful benchmark. Rodha's mocks are deliberately 10–15% harder than the real exam on a TCS iON-style interface — good for building endurance. Cracku's 20 DashCATs and iQuanta's 35 mocks with AI analytics are also credible. Serious aspirants often combine two series in the final months.

faqs.q: Is online coaching enough to crack CAT?
faqs.a: Yes — online-prepared students score 99+ percentiles every year, and CAT itself is a computer-based exam, so online mock practice transfers directly. The trade-off is accountability: classroom programs impose structure, while online prep demands self-discipline. Platforms compensate with daily targets (Cracku), 24/7 communities (iQuanta) and fixed live schedules (Rodha, MBA Wallah).
